case_title: PON JOSEPH VS JACKSON JEFFERY J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PON JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON JEFFERY J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON JEFFERY J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PON JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON JEFFERY J. $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,912.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO JEFFREY JACKSON RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR PON JOSEPH ASSIGNED TO DAVID J JOHN, DAB FIRST COURT RECOVERY
